meaning: Tower(法国巴黎的)埃菲尔铁塔(在塞纳河南岸)
examples: The Eiffel Tower in Paris was completed in 1889.
Now there is an Eiffel Tower of their own in Paris!
If you ever saw a dotted line standing upright, it's the Eiffel Tower.
Weddings are performed in gondolas at the Venetian or atop the Eiffel Tower at Paris Las Vegas.
Nearly half of the rooms face south with dramatic views across the Seine to the nearby Eiffel Tour.
